rulings.Case Title: SOO MING LAI VS. MARIA NGUYEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 23, 2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT ALLEN LAI, GINA CHU, AMANDA SPEISER DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT sustained without prejudice to Cross-Complainant seeking an amendment to the Complaint to Doe-in a personal representative or an executor of the estate should it become necessary and proper to adjudicate the a rights involved in the Cross-Complaint. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAULA HAGAN BENNETT VS. BERNARD JOSEPH HAGAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 23, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MARK SCHULMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts showing that the value of the judgements at the time of the "settlement" for a Deed of Trust was not "reasonably equivalent" to the Deed of Trust. The Court takes judicial notice of the original amount of judgments, of the passage of time, and statutory entitlement to interest; and (2) Mr. Schulman, as individual, is a proper defendant in this action. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL S NOUNOU VS. ANDREW LESKO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Andrew Lesko And Tara Juell'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Abate Or Stay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 23, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT ANDREW LESKO, TARA JUELL Defendants Andrew Lesko And Tara Juell'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Abate Or Stay continued to November 8, 2019. By no later than November 6, 2019 the parties to provide an update regarding the Rent Board Hearing and/or determination. Trial is continued to November 12, 2019 pending the resolution of this motion and/or Rent Board Determination. In an unlawful detainer the validity of the operative Notice is one of the determinations to be made by the trier of fact. In this case the underlying issue will be whether notice should be compliant with rules applicable to commercial or to residential tenancies. The Rent Board is to decide whether requirements applicable to the residential tenancies control. Hearing Required to address why Defendants should not post rent/daily damages for the duration of the continuance and/or abatement. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DAVID HUNTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Re Deposition Of Carlos Aznar As Person Most Kknowledgeable And Request For Sanctions Against Ryan Murphy In The Amount Of $1,385.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 23, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Re Deposition Of Carlos Aznar As Person Most Kknowledgeable And Request For Sanctions Against Ryan Murphy In The Amount Of $1,385.00 transferred to Department 220 to be heard by the Honorable Kathleen Kelly at 9:30 a.m. per the Order of the Presiding Judge. The parties are ordered to meet and confer prior to the hearing and agree on a deposition date. At this time the Court is considering sanctioning both sides for abuse of discovery process. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SF 434 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LLC VS. JONATHAN DIXON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 23, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT JONATHAN DIXON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OFF CALENDAR, no proof of service re: Jonathan Dixon on file. =(501/CFH)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 23, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT ADAM PITCHIE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to expressly allege the method of service of the Notice, personal, post/mail or both. Specifically, Plaintiff shall expressly alleged which method of service forms the basis of this UD. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Notice is compliant with CCP 1161. =(501/CFH)
